description:
Xposed module to clean up Android's Share Sheet

An Xposed module for cleaning up Android's Share Sheet. Added settings app, Quick Share filtering, and delete-after-sharing for screenshots.

Features:

  • Hide Direct Share suggestions and block share target profiling
  • Hide Quick Share / Nearby Share
  • Option to delete shared screenshots after sharing (root required)
  • Built-in settings app

Requirements:

  • Android 11 or higher and AOSP rom
  • LSPosed framework
